lead: Equilens builds regulatory infrastructure for algorithmic decision-making. FL-BSA, our self-hosted fair-lending bias-simulation appliance, helps regulated teams simulate lending models, measure disparity, and produce audit-ready evidence packs1 without moving customer data outside their environment.
